PROTOCOL.TITLE: UMCC 2021.045, Chugh
PROTOCOL.FULL_TITLE: An Open-Label, Multicenter, First-in-Human, Dose-Escalation Phase 1 Study of INBRX-109 in Subjects with Locally Advanced or Metastatic Solid Tumors Including Sarcomas
PROTOCOL.SUMMARY_OBJ: This is a first-in-human, open-label, non-randomized, three-part phase 1 trial of INBRX-109.
PROTOCOL.DISEASE_SITE: Melanoma, Skin; Pancreas; Soft Tissue; Stomach
PROTOCOL.ELIGIBILITY: Inclusion Criteria||~Histologically confirmed advanced solid tumors refractory to standard therapy.||~Measurable disease per RECISTv1.1.||~~Modified RECIST for mesothelioma.||~ECOG performance status 0 or 1.||Exclusion Criteria||~Prior treatment with DR5 agonists.||~Anticancer therapy within 4 weeks prior to first dose.
